3013850.name: BUMPY JUMPY
3013850.description:
Explore 69+ levels fully designed around speed-running through them in the most optimal time!

Share your Report Card of your feats!

THIS IS A SHORT GAME!






Gameplay Features
  • figure Out the Optimal Paths Through A Stage.
  • race Your Ghosts.
  • Do It Again Faster
  • Now Even Faster
  • find the developer's best time and gloat at them later.

Designed from the perspective of what I thought a Sonic game would have played like if I never played or saw Sonic game.
I hope you like it.
